name: Storm Shooter
name_jp: ストーム・シューター
desc: Once per turn, you can select and activate 1 of these effects: ● Move this card to an adjacent (horizontal) unoccupied Monster Card Zone. ● Return 1 Spell, Trap or Monster Card on your opponent's side of the field in the same column as this card to its owner's hand.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can select and activate 1 of these effects: ● Move this card to an adjacent (horizontal) unoccupied Monster Card Zone. ● Return 1 Spell, Trap or Monster Card on your opponent's side of the field in the same column as this card to its owner's hand.
eff: Once per turn, you can select and activate 1 of these effects: ● Move this card to an adjacent (horizontal) unoccupied Monster Card Zone. ● Return 1 Spell, Trap or Monster Card on your opponent's side of the field in the same column as this card to its owner's hand.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
